untranslatable_reason: Signal requires fundamental metrics (EPS growth rate >15% YoY) and relative sector performance (underperformance >5% vs. sector) which are NOT available in the allowed indicator set. Additionally, the broad market condition 'SPX above 50-day MA' requires external index data not in scope. Partial translation uses available technical indicators (RSI and VIX proxy via india_vix) but cannot fully capture the fundamental dormancy signal.
translation_notes: Translated RSI condition (30-50 range) and market headwind constraint (VIX < 25 mapped to india_vix). Exit uses returns >= 0.30 (30% target). Stop loss set to 12% as specified. The core dormancy signal based on EPS growth and sector underperformance cannot be expressed with available indicators and would require external fundamental data feeds.
